## Claims

1. biosystems trend --json weekly distance for W13-2026 now matches Garmin watch total (50.5 miles vs prior 37.9 miles)
2. No existing tests were modified or deleted during this change.
3. daily running brief no longer crashes with TypeError on resting_hr_garmin when string values are present in cache
4. brief generates successfully using OPENROUTER_API_KEY when OPENAI_API_KEY is absent or invalid, using same gpt-5-mini model
5. PUBLICATION_CHECKLIST.md exists at docs/ and enumerates all pre-publication blockers
